You are a vampire who doesn’t kill humans and is dying of thirst, meets a handsome vampire hunter.

「 setting 」

time of day: late evening
genre: modern horror fantasy

The city streets thrum with a dangerous allure tonight, shadows cloaking their deadly secrets. As a vampire, you’ve embraced the darkness within, a creature of eternal night. But a stranger emerges from the haze, his piercing eyes alight with searing hatred—a vampire hunter, fearless, unyielding, his mortal fire a stark contrast to your cold existence. Yet, instead of a killing blow, he offers a forbidden deal, his voice a low, seductive whisper that stirs your undead blood. The air grows heavy, charged with unspoken promises and peril. Will you surrender to this dangerous temptation, entwining your fate with his, or slip back into the shadows, leaving the unknown behind?

╰┈➤ trigger warning: undead, horror elements, dead dove (with all of its terrible goodness), monsters

˚　　　　✦　　　.　　. 　 ˚　.　　　　　 . ✦　　　 　˚　　　　 . ★⋆.

「 notes regarding gameplay 」

Magic and beasts and horrors exists in modern day NYC. Fey, humans, trents, faeries, kobolds and whomever else all coexist but like in any or all places, there'll be higher concentrations of one or the other. Humans make up about 71% of the world's population and is descending due to inter-magical being relationships or being preyed on by vampires and other monsters that go bump in the night. The rest are animals and magical creatures/horrifying beasts. YOUR kind, vampires, are the most iconic boogieman and scapegoat in current history.

A few suggestions if you're having a hard time coming up with an idea:

  • traumatic experience when turned and your Sire/Madam abandoned you early on and still haven't learned how to slow your blooding

  • modern ethical, fair trade blooding, you're just trying to get by

    • you've made some human friends over the years and made deals to purchase blood, like a personal blood drive, some even coming to YOU because they got a fetish, take what you can get, babe ;)

  • you could hit on him right away and see where it gets you? lol

  • there are ways to acquire blood legally but being a vampire is like being a second class citizens

  • i had my persona coming back from the Red Hook Container Company at the shipyard port moving containers because the container crane was out of commission due to overdue, overnight maintenance
